name: code-review-roundtable
stop_condition: Stop after one review round and produce a final review summary with unresolved risks.

turns.name: review
turns.instruction: Review the supplied code context. Lead with bugs, regressions, safety risks, and missing tests. Use file and line references when evidence is present.

turns.name: critic
turns.instruction: Challenge the review. Look for false positives, missed high-severity risks, invalid assumptions, and test gaps. Put only the substantive critique inside the configured roundtable-output markers.

final.name: final-review
final.instruction: Produce the final code-review document. Lead with confirmed findings by severity, then open questions, test gaps, and a brief summary.
